name: Popcorn Cake # 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the entire 12-cup bundt pan (or a 10-inch tube pan) with foil.
2. In a 6-quart container or 2 large bowls, combine the popped popcorn, chocolate chips, and peanuts. Set aside.
3. In a medium saucepan, melt the margarine over low heat.
4. Stir in the peanut butter and marshmallows until melted, stirring constantly.
5. Pour the marshmallow mixture over the popcorn mix and stir to coat evenly.
6. Press the mixture firmly into the prepared pan.
7. Allow it to cool completely before removing from the pan.
8. Cut into slices to serve.
